name: major_bleeding_risk_score_workflow
description: Calculate the total major bleeding risk score for an acute coronary syndrome (ACS) patient based on creatinine clearance, baseline hematocrit, heart rate, systolic blood pressure, and categorical factors (sex, congestive heart failure signs, diabetes, previous vascular disease or stroke).

inputs.input_desc: True if male, False if female
True if congestive heart failure signs present, False otherwise
True if diabetes present, False otherwise
True if previous vascular disease or stroke history, False otherwise

steps.step_description: Determine the score based on creatinine clearance (mL/min)
steps.reason: This step assigns a score based on the provided creatinine clearance value according to clinical risk scoring rules.
steps.detail: If creatinine_clearance <= 15, score = 39; else if 16-30, score = 35; else if 31-60, score = 28; else if 61-90, score = 17; else if 91-120, score = 7; else if >120, score = 0.

steps.step_description: Determine the score based on baseline hematocrit (%)
steps.reason: This step assigns a score based on the provided baseline hematocrit value according to clinical risk scoring rules.
steps.detail: If hematocrit < 31.0, score = 9; else if 31.0-33.9, score = 7; else if 34.0-36.9, score = 3; else if 37.0-39.9, score = 2; else if >= 40.0, score = 0.

steps.step_description: Determine the score based on heart rate (beats/min)
steps.reason: This step assigns a score based on the provided heart rate value according to clinical risk scoring rules.
steps.detail: If heart_rate <= 70, score = 0; else if 71-80, score = 1; else if 81-90, score = 3; else if 91-100, score = 6; else if 101-110, score = 8; else if 111-120, score = 10; else if >= 121, score = 11.

steps.step_description: Determine the score based on systolic blood pressure (mmHg)
steps.reason: This step assigns a score based on the provided systolic blood pressure value according to clinical risk scoring rules.
steps.detail: If systolic_bp <= 90, score = 10; else if 91-100, score = 8; else if 101-120, score = 5; else if 121-180, score = 1; else if 181-200, score = 3; else if >= 201, score = 5.

steps.step_description: Determine the combined score for sex, heart failure signs, diabetes, and vascular disease/stroke history

step_inputs.input_desc: True if male, False if female
True if congestive heart failure signs present, False otherwise
True if diabetes present, False otherwise
True if previous vascular disease or stroke history, False otherwise

step_outputs.output_desc: Combined score from sex, heart failure, diabetes, and vascular disease/stroke

steps.reason: This step combines scores from multiple categorical risk factors by applying individual rules and summing them.
steps.detail: Sex score: if is_male true, 0; else 8. Heart failure score: if has_heart_failure true, 7; else 0. Diabetes score: if has_diabetes true, 6; else 0. Vascular disease/stroke score: if has_vascular_disease_stroke true, 6; else 0. Sum these four scores to get categorical_score.

steps.step_description: Sum all individual scores to compute the total major bleeding risk score
steps.reason: This step performs a simple arithmetic sum of all component scores to obtain the final risk score.
steps.detail: total_score = creatinine_clearance_score + hematocrit_score + heart_rate_score + systolic_bp_score + categorical_score

output.output_desc: Total major bleeding risk score for the ACS patient
